settings.editor: Professional support for skilled workers seeking international career opportunities. From profile assessment to employer coordination and pre-departure preparation - we guide you every step of the way.

settings.title: Built for Skilled Professionals Ready to Work Abroad

settings.editor: Whether you work in healthcare, engineering, IT, hospitality, construction, or other skilled trades - our recruitment support is designed to help you find the right international opportunity and prepare for a successful move.
From the moment you submit your profile to the day you depart for your new role, our team provides hands-on support tailored to your career goals.
Thorough review of your qualifications, experience, and career goals to identify the best opportunities.
Professional guidance to optimize your CV for international job markets and employer expectations.
Coaching and mock interviews to help you feel confident and prepared for employer conversations.
We match your profile with suitable opportunities and coordinate directly with employers on your behalf.
Step-by-step support with documentation, visa applications, and compliance requirements.
Orientation and practical guidance to help you prepare for life and work in your new country.

settings.title: Your Path to an International Career

settings.editor: Fill in your details and upload your CV for initial review.
Our team reviews your qualifications, experience, and suitability.
We match your profile with suitable opportunities and coordinate with employers.
Attend interviews, receive guidance, and work toward securing an offer.
Complete all documentation and receive pre-departure support.
Having these documents ready will help us process your application faster. Don't worry if you're missing some - our team will guide you on how to obtain them.
We believe in full transparency. Here are our service tiers - no hidden costs or surprises.
Profile assessment and eligibility review
Document preparation and application processing
Full service including employer coordination

Important Notice: Final job offers, work permits, and visa outcomes are determined by employers and relevant government authorities. Infinite Global Recruitment provides guidance and coordination support only. We do not guarantee specific job placements or visa approvals.
Professional service from start to finish. They helped me prepare my CV, coordinated with employers, and guided me through every step.
Job Seeker - Dubai
Transparent about fees and realistic about outcomes. That honesty is what made me trust them with my career move.
Job Seeker - Europe

settings.title: Common Questions About Our Recruitment Services

tabs.tab_title: What types of jobs do you help with?
tabs.tab_content: We support a range of skilled occupations including healthcare, engineering, IT, hospitality, construction trades, and more.

tabs.tab_title: Do you charge the job seeker or the employer?
tabs.tab_content: Please contact us for our current fee structure. We are transparent about all costs upfront.

tabs.tab_title: How long does the recruitment process take?
tabs.tab_content: Timelines vary depending on the destination, employer, and visa processing. Our team will give you a realistic estimate during consultation.
No. We provide profile optimization, coordination, and support, but final hiring decisions are made by employers.

tabs.tab_title: What if my profile isn't suitable?
tabs.tab_content: We will provide honest feedback and suggest steps to improve your profile (additional certifications, experience, language skills, etc.).

tabs.tab_title: Do you help with visa and travel?
tabs.tab_content: Yes, we provide documentation guidance, visa support, and pre-departure briefing to help you prepare for your move.

settings.title: Ready to Take Your Career Global?

settings.editor: Submit your profile today and let our team start working on your international career pathway. No commitment required - just take the first step.
